bug_report.summary: After canceling Firefox Screenshots overlay, typing “ñö” into the page input results in missing character (only “ñ” appears)
steps_to_reproduce: Load the provided Keyboard Test data URL (auto-focused input).
Start Firefox Screenshots via context menu → “Take Screenshot”.
Type “ñö” while the overlay is active (should not reach the page).
Click the page input field and type “ñö”.
expected_behaviors: After the overlay is closed, typing works normally and the input contains exactly: “ñö”.
actual_behaviors: After the overlay is closed, the input contains only: “ñ” (the “ö” is not entered).
